underlying_goal: Instrument the interpret pipeline to distinguish debug translations from real traffic in Honeycomb, and update Honeycomb terraform boards/triggers accordingly
friction_detail: Terraform removed blocks conflicted with resource definitions, and an annotation referencing a dataset-specific query ID broke when switched to __all__ dataset, requiring a hotfix to main.
brief_summary: User wanted to tag debug translations and update Honeycomb boards/triggers to filter them out; achieved across two repos with some terraform deployment issues that were resolved.
